mapper.select: select id, name, location, open_time, close_time, max_hours, daily_limit from campus_study_room order by id asc
select id, name, location, open_time, close_time, max_hours, daily_limit from campus_study_room where id = #{roomId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into campus_study_room (name, location, open_time, close_time, max_hours, daily_limit) values (#{name}, #{location}, #{openTime}, #{closeTime}, #{maxHours}, #{dailyLimit})
mapper.update: update campus_study_room set name = #{name}, location = #{location}, open_time = #{openTime}, close_time = #{closeTime}, max_hours = #{maxHours}, daily_limit = #{dailyLimit} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, study_room_id, seat_code, floor_no, zone_name, status from campus_seat where study_room_id = #{roomId} order by floor_no, seat_code
select id, study_room_id, max_hours, daily_limit, cancel_before_minutes, enabled from campus_reservation_rule where study_room_id = #{roomId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into campus_reservation_rule (study_room_id, max_hours, daily_limit, cancel_before_minutes, enabled) values (#{studyRoomId}, #{maxHours}, #{dailyLimit}, #{cancelBeforeMinutes}, #{enabled})
mapper.select: select count(1) from information_schema.columns where table_schema = database() and table_name = 'campus_reservation_record' and column_name = 'reschedule_count'
mapper.update: alter table campus_reservation_record add column reschedule_count int not null default 0
mapper.select: select count(1) from campus_reservation_record where seat_id = #{seatId} and reservation_date = #{reservationDate} and status = 'BOOKED' and #{startTime} < end_time and #{endTime} > start_time
select count(1) from campus_reservation_record where user_id = #{userId} and reservation_date = #{reservationDate} and status = 'BOOKED' and #{startTime} < end_time and #{endTime} > start_time
select id, study_room_id, seat_code, floor_no, zone_name, status from campus_seat where id = #{seatId} for update

select r.id, r.user_id, r.study_room_id, r.seat_id, r.reservation_date, r.start_time, r.end_time, r.status, r.voucher_code, r.created_at, r.reschedule_count, sr.name as study_room_name, s.seat_code from campus_reservation_record r left join campus_study_room sr on sr.id = r.study_room_id left join campus_seat s on s.id = r.seat_id where r.user_id = #{userId} order by r.reservation_date desc, r.start_time desc, r.id desc

select r.id, r.user_id, r.study_room_id, r.seat_id, r.reservation_date, r.start_time, r.end_time, r.status, r.voucher_code, r.created_at, r.reschedule_count, sr.name as study_room_name, s.seat_code from campus_reservation_record r left join campus_study_room sr on sr.id = r.study_room_id left join campus_seat s on s.id = r.seat_id where r.study_room_id = #{roomId} and r.reservation_date >= #{startDate} and r.reservation_date <= #{endDate} order by r.reservation_date asc, r.start_time asc, r.id asc
select id, user_id, study_room_id, seat_id, reservation_date, start_time, end_time, status, voucher_code, created_at, reschedule_count from campus_reservation_record where id = #{id} limit 1

select id, user_id, study_room_id, seat_id, reservation_date, start_time, end_time, status, voucher_code, created_at, reschedule_count from campus_reservation_record where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} limit 1

select id, user_id, study_room_id, seat_id, reservation_date, start_time, end_time, status, voucher_code, created_at, reschedule_count from campus_reservation_record where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} for update
mapper.update: update campus_reservation_record set study_room_id = #{studyRoomId}, seat_id = #{seatId}, reservation_date = #{reservationDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status}, voucher_code = #{voucherCode}, reschedule_count = #{rescheduleCount} where id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into campus_seat (study_room_id, seat_code, floor_no, zone_name, status) values
(#{seat.studyRoomId}, #{seat.seatCode}, #{seat.floorNo}, #{seat.zoneName}, #{seat.status})
